summary:
# 每日彙整報告

## 📰 今日重點摘要
1. 特朗普公開其超過12億美元的加密貨幣收益，並持有5000萬美元的比特幣，顯示其在加密市場的影響力。
2. 比特幣目前價格為$58,495，距離「熊市最佳投資機會」僅差5000美元，市場持續承壓。
3. 英國投資者對幣安及其CEO趙長鵬提起2億美元訴訟，這將可能進一步影響市場信心。
4. Circle股價因OpenUSD的威脅而暴跌16%，引發市場對穩定幣的關注。
5. 恐懼貪婪指數降至15，顯示市場情緒極度恐懼。

## 📊 市場概況
整體加密貨幣市場氛圍偏向悲觀，主要幣種如比特幣和以太坊持續下跌。比特幣價格下滑約3%，目前報價為$58,495；以太坊則報價$1,566.67，跌幅約2.93%。隨著市場情緒轉向恐懼，投資者對未來的走勢持謹慎態度。

## 🔍 技術分析解讀
比特幣的相對強弱指數（RSI）目前為26.43，顯示出超賣狀態，暗示可能出現反彈壓力。然而，均線顯示出空頭信號，表明短期內可能仍有下行空間。以太坊的RSI為31.51，處於接近超賣區域，均線同樣顯示空頭趨勢。其他幣種如BNB和XRP也顯示出類似的空頭跡象，需保持警覺。

## 😱 市場情緒
當前市場的恐懼貪婪指數為15，顯示出極度恐懼的情緒。這通常意味著市場參與者對未來的走勢感到不安，可能會導致進一步的拋售壓力。社群情緒普遍謹慎，對於短期內的交易決策持保留態度，建議投資者密切關注市場動態。

## ⚠️ 風險提醒
由於市場情緒極度恐懼，加上特定事件如特朗普的財務披露及訴訟案件，可能導致市場波動加劇。投資者應謹慎行事，考慮風險管理策略，避免在市場不確定性中重倉操作。

## 🎯 今日觀察重點
投資者應關注比特幣是否能在$58,000附近找到支撐，以及以太坊能否突破$1,600的壓力位。此外，持續觀察幣安及Circle的訴訟進程，以及市場對新型ETF的反應，這些因素都可能影響後續的市場走勢。

news.title: Trump pocketed more than $1 billion from crypto ties as industry headed toward slump

news.summary: “The crypto industry shouldn’t need wake-up calls from the White House or anyone else,” said StarkWare CEO Eli Ben-Sasson.

news.summary_zh: StarkWare發布了Starknet的量子路線圖，強調行業必須跟上技術進步，無法再找藉口。

news.title: StarkWare unveils Starknet post-quantum roadmap, calling it crypto’s ‘strongest’ to date
news.summary: StarkWare debuted a three-phase roadmap to make Starknet quantum-ready within months, according to the company.
news.title_zh: StarkWare推出Starknet後量子路線圖，稱其為加密界‘最強’計劃
news.summary_zh: StarkWare的後量子路線圖被稱為加密界最強的計劃，預示著未來的技術挑戰與機遇。

news.title: Spiko links EU regulated T-bill funds to Coinbase stablecoin rails
news.summary: Spiko integrated Coinbase Payments into two EU regulated UCITS Treasury funds, enabling USDC and EURC subscriptions and redemption payments through Base.
news.title_zh: Spiko將歐盟監管的國債基金與Coinbase穩定幣鏈接
news.summary_zh: Spiko成功將歐盟監管的國債基金與Coinbase的穩定幣系統連結，促進資本流動性。

news.title: Morning Minute: A Change of Strategy
news.summary: Michael Saylor's Strategy is rolling out some major changes to how it handles Bitcoin going forward. And so far, the market likes it.
news.title_zh: 早晨分鐘：策略變更
news.summary_zh: 報導探討了市場策略的變化，可能影響投資者的決策。

news.title: New York Life Investment Management makes first tokenized move partnering with Centrifuge on high-yield corporate bond strategy
news.summary: The tokenized fund will enable eligible investors to access NYLIM’s established institutional high-yield strategy.
news.title_zh: 紐約人壽投資管理首次與Centrifuge合作，推動高收益企業債券策略的代幣化
news.summary_zh: 紐約人壽投資管理與Centrifuge合作，開啟高收益企業債券的代幣化新局。

news.title: Bitcoin’s quiet $59,000-$60,000 range is starting to look dangerous
news.title_zh: 比特幣的靜默$59,000-$60,000區間開始顯得危險
news.summary_zh: 比特幣在$59,000-$60,000的區間內波動，市場情緒變得不安。

news.title: New York Life's $800 billion asset manager makes tokenization debut with Centrifuge fund
news.title_zh: 紐約人壽的$8000億資產管理公司與Centrifuge基金首次進行代幣化
news.summary_zh: 紐約人壽的資產管理部門首次進行代幣化，與Centrifuge基金合作。

news.title: Bitcoin $4.4 billion supply overhang emerges as institutional demand wilts
news.title_zh: 比特幣$44億供應過剩出現，機構需求減弱
news.summary_zh: 隨著機構需求減少，比特幣出現$44億的供應過剩問題。

news.title: Solana Company to back Kazakhstan’s $6B crypto megacity ambition
news.summary: Nasdaq-listed Solana Company has signed a memorandum of understanding with Kazakhstan's Alatau City, which seeks to become a key crypto hub in Central Asia.
news.title_zh: Solana公司支持哈薩克斯坦$60億加密城市的雄心
news.summary_zh: Solana公司計劃支持哈薩克斯坦建立一個價值$60億的加密城市。

news.title: FCA Finalizes Landmark Crypto Rules to Make UK a 'Global Hub'
news.summary: The UK regulator has published its final rulebook for crypto firms ahead of a mandatory regime coming into force in late 2027.
news.title_zh: 英國金融行為監管局最終確定具有里程碑意義的加密規則，將英國打造成「全球中心」
news.summary_zh: FCA確定新的加密規則，旨在將英國發展為全球加密貨幣的中心。

news.title: Hollywood director Carl Rinsch sentenced to 30 months for diverting $11 million in TV production funds to stock options, crypto and luxury purchases
news.summary: "47 Ronin" director Carl Rinsch got 30 months in prison for stealing $11M meant for a Netflix show, spent on crypto and Rolls-Royces.
news.title_zh: 好萊塢導演Carl Rinsch因挪用$1100萬電視製作資金被判刑30個月
news.summary_zh: 導演Carl Rinsch因挪用製作資金進行股票選擇、加密和奢侈品購買而被判刑。

news.title: Bitcoin nears 2024 lows as options traders pay up for downside protection
news.title_zh: 比特幣接近2024年低點，期權交易者為下行保護支付高價
news.summary_zh: 比特幣價格接近2024年低點，期權交易者為保護資產支付高額費用。

news.title: Strategy heads for 11th losing month in 12 as bitcoin weakness continues
news.title_zh: 策略在12個月中第11個月持續虧損，比特幣疲軟情況仍在持續
news.summary_zh: 比特幣持續疲軟，策略在過去12個月中第11個月出現虧損。

news.title: ESMA MiCA warning puts Binance EU service changes under scrutiny
news.summary: ESMA said EU crypto clients must be served through a MiCA-authorized entity as Binance faces questions over its servicing model in the region after the MiCA deadline.
news.title_zh: ESMA MiCA 警告使 Binance 歐盟服務變更受到審查
news.summary_zh: 歐洲證券及市場管理局對 Binance 的服務變更發出警告，可能影響其在歐盟的運營。

news.title: UK to lower stablecoin capital buffers, undercutting EU's MiCA requirements
news.title_zh: 英國將降低穩定幣資本緩衝，削弱歐盟 MiCA 要求
news.summary_zh: 英國計劃降低穩定幣的資本緩衝，這可能會影響與歐盟的金融規範競爭。

news.title: SEC wins $5.5 million default judgment over alleged fake crypto platform NanoBit
news.title_zh: SEC 贏得 550 萬美元的缺席判決，針對涉嫌假冒加密平台 NanoBit
news.summary_zh: 美國證券交易委員會對 NanoBit 提起訴訟，並成功獲得550萬美元的缺席判決。

news.title: Kalshi hit with 14-day restraining order in Michigan, blocking sports prediction markets in state
news.summary: Jurisdiction over prediction market platforms is an ongoing dispute between the CFTC and multiple state regulators.
news.title_zh: Kalshi 在密歇根州遭遇 14 天禁制令，阻止體育預測市場
news.summary_zh: 密歇根州法院對 Kalshi 發出禁制令，禁止其在該州運營體育預測市場。

news.title: '47 Ronin' Director Gets 30 Months for Spending Netflix's $11M on Dogecoin
news.summary: Carl Rinsch gambled Netflix's $11 million on stock options and Dogecoin, then spent the winnings on luxury cars and watches.
news.title_zh: '47 Ronin' 導演因將 Netflix 的 1100 萬美元花在 Dogecoin 上被判刑 30 個月
news.summary_zh: 電影導演因挪用 Netflix 資金投資加密貨幣 Dogecoin，被判刑 30 個月。

news.title: Michigan judge blocks Kalshi from allowing residents to place sports bets
news.summary: A Michigan Judge has temporarily blocked Kalshi from offering sports betting contracts to residents, escalating the state-federal fight over prediction markets and gambling laws.
news.title_zh: 密歇根州法官阻止 Kalshi 允許居民下注體育賽事
news.summary_zh: 密歇根州法官裁定 Kalshi 不得允許居民參與體育賭博活動。

news.title: Benchmark sees over 500% upside in Strategy, reiterates $570 target on new capital framework
news.summary: Benchmark reiterated its Buy rating and $570 target on Strategy, citing its new active two-way capital management framework.
news.title_zh: Benchmark 預測策略上漲超過 500%，重申 570 美元目標
news.summary_zh: Benchmark 對新資本框架的策略預測顯示出超過 500% 的潛在增長。

news.title: Celsius-linked Bitcoin miner Ionic Digital seeks Nasdaq direct listing amid AI pivot
news.summary: The Celsius-linked Bitcoin miner is seeking a Nasdaq direct listing as it repurposes mining infrastructure for AI and high-performance computing workloads.
news.title_zh: 與 Celsius 相關的比特幣礦工 Ionic Digital 尋求納斯達克直接上市，轉型 AI
news.summary_zh: Ionic Digital 企圖在納斯達克直接上市，並計劃轉型為人工智慧相關業務。

news.title: Bitcoin's correlation with dollar-yen rate hits -0.90, undercutting 'carry trade' theory
news.title_zh: 比特幣與美元-日元匯率的相關性降至 -0.90，削弱 '套利交易' 理論
news.summary_zh: 比特幣與美元-日元匯率的負相關性顯示出套利交易理論的脆弱性。

news.title: Live updates: bitcoin closes out weak quarter; Trump reports over $1 billion in crypto proceeds
news.title_zh: 即時更新：比特幣結束疲弱季度；特朗普報告超過 10 億美元的加密收益
news.summary_zh: 比特幣在一個疲弱的季度結束時，特朗普報告其加密貨幣收益超過 10 億美元。

news.title: Dubai set for crypto firm influx as MiCA deadline pushes companies to reassess Europe
news.title_zh: 迪拜迎接加密公司湧入，MiCA截止日期促使企業重新評估歐洲
news.summary_zh: 隨著MiCA法規的推進，迪拜成為加密公司尋求新機會的熱點。

news.title: Australia’s crypto travel rule is coming into effect: Here’s what's changing
news.summary: From July, crypto exchanges operating in Australia will prompt for additional information on all outgoing and incoming transfers.
news.title_zh: 澳洲的加密旅行規則即將生效：變化有哪些？
news.summary_zh: 澳洲即將實施新的加密旅行規則，將影響加密貨幣的使用與報告要求。

news.title: Cathie Wood’s ARK adds $43.5M in crypto stocks amid market dip
news.summary: ARK Invest's biggest crypto stock purchases over the past three trading days were Coinbase and Circle, whose shares have fallen 17% and 27.6%, respectively, over the past month.
news.title_zh: Cathie Wood的ARK在市場下跌中增持4350萬美元的加密股票
news.summary_zh: ARK Invest在市場波動中看好加密股票，進一步增持資產。

news.title: Self-exiled Chinese billionaire sentenced to 30 years for fraud involving crypto
news.summary: Guo was arrested in 2023 for orchestrating a more than $1 billion fraud conspiracy involving cryptocurrency.
news.title_zh: 自我流亡的中國億萬富翁因涉及加密詐騙被判30年監禁
news.summary_zh: 一名中國億萬富翁因加密貨幣詐騙案被判刑，顯示法律對詐騙行為的嚴厲打擊。

news.title: XRP holds $1 support as network activity rises and leverage clears out
news.title_zh: XRP在網絡活動上升和槓桿清算中保持1美元支撐
news.summary_zh: XRP的網絡活動增加，並在市場波動中維持1美元的支撐位。

news.title: Ether, solana and dogecoin slide as Strategy's bitcoin sales plan pressures market
news.title_zh: 以太坊、Solana和狗狗幣因策略性比特幣銷售計劃下滑
news.summary_zh: 市場因比特幣銷售計劃而承壓，導致以太坊和其他幣種價格下跌。

news.title: Tether trades at 7% to 10% premium in India. Exchanges say it's just supply and demand
news.title_zh: 泰達在印度以7%至10%的溢價交易，交易所表示僅是供需問題
news.summary_zh: 印度市場上泰達穩定幣的溢價交易反映了當地的供需狀況。

news.title: Bitcoin under pressure below $60,000 as Japanese yen hits 40-year low against the U.S. dollar
news.title_zh: 比特幣在60000美元以下承壓，日元對美元匯率創40年新低
news.summary_zh: 比特幣價格受到日元貶值影響，持續低於60000美元的關鍵水平。

news.title: Bitmine lifts Ether holdings to 5.7M as it joins Russell 1000
news.summary: Bitmine purchased about $43 million worth of Ether last week as it entered the Russell 1000 Index, bringing it closer to its goal of owning 5% of ETH’s supply.
news.title_zh: Bitmine將以太坊持有量提升至570萬，加入羅素1000指數
news.summary_zh: Bitmine增持以太坊，並成功進入羅素1000指數，顯示其市場地位上升。

news.title: Sovereign funds see Bitcoin discount as entry point: MidChains CEO
news.summary: It sends “a very clear signal” to other institutions that may be sitting on the sidelines and looking at these larger funds as leaders, said MidChains CEO Basil Al Askari.
news.title_zh: 主權基金視比特幣折扣為進場機會：MidChains首席執行官
news.summary_zh: MidChains的CEO指出，主權基金將比特幣的價格折扣視為投資良機。

news.title: SEC wins $5.4M judgment in NanoBit crypto fraud case
news.summary: The SEC alleged that NanoBit’s crypto trading platform was fake and that hundreds of thousands of dollars in investor funds were misappropriated.
news.title_zh: 美國證券交易委員會在NanoBit加密詐騙案中贏得540萬美元判決
news.summary_zh: 美國證券交易委員會成功獲得540萬美元的判決，針對NanoBit的加密貨幣詐騙案件。

news.title: Securitize to debut on NYSE this Thursday after gaining final nod for merger
news.summary: Securitize announced that shareholders of Cantor have greenlit the business combination, which is expected to close on Wednesday.
news.title_zh: Securitize將於本週四在紐約證券交易所首次亮相，獲得合併最終批准
news.summary_zh: Securitize獲得合併的最終批准，將於本週四在紐約證券交易所上市。

news.title: Ark Invest loads up on Coinbase, Circle, Bullish, Robinhood shares as stocks rally higher
news.summary: Ark bought $6.85 million worth of Coinbase, $6.21 million worth of Circle Internet Group, and $3.54 million in Bullish on Monday.
news.title_zh: Ark Invest增持Coinbase、Circle、Bullish和Robinhood股票，隨著股市上漲
news.summary_zh: Ark Invest在股市回暖之際，增持了多家加密相關公司的股票。

news.title: Singapore's Hyperliquid warning, Indonesia's FinFluencer license: Asia Express
news.summary: Hyperliquid follows Bybit onto Singapore's "naughty" list, Indonesia's new scheme to certify social media influencers promoting crypto: Asia Express.
news.title_zh: 新加坡Hyperliquid發出警告，印尼FinFluencer獲得許可：亞洲快報
news.summary_zh: 新加坡的Hyperliquid發出警告，同時印尼的FinFluencer獲得了相關許可。

news.title: UK sets final crypto rules as firms face 2027 FCA authorization deadline
news.summary: The UK’s financial regulator has published its crypto regulatory framework, setting the authorization deadline for cryptocurrency firms for February 2027.
news.title_zh: 英國制定最終加密規則，企業面臨2027年FCA授權截止日期
news.summary_zh: 英國已確定加密貨幣的最終規則，企業需在2027年前獲得FCA授權。

news.title: UK sets capital, market abuse rules in landmark crypto framework
news.summary: The FCA finalized UK crypto rules covering capital, stablecoins and market abuse ahead of Oct. 2027 implementation.
news.title_zh: 英國在開創性加密框架中設定資本和市場濫用規則
news.summary_zh: 英國推出新的加密框架，明確資本和市場濫用的相關規則。
